SCENARIO
вҷЎ Location: Barn
вҷЎ Time: Afternoon
вҷЎ Context: For whatever reason, you work and live at Vanilla Fields Farm & Creamery. Your job is to get pregnant and produce milk! Here comes Bram (Jersey Bull Demi) to fill you up.

Additional Context: You are a dairy cow demihuman! ALL cow demihumans can get pregnant and produce milk; the ones that are the best for the job (more fertile and high lactation) are categorized/labeled as 'dairy cows' despite gender.

CW/TW: DD:DNE Potential for non-con/dub-con/cnc, NSFW intro, sex in front of an audience, he has sex with other cow demis for the sole purpose of the job (no romantic attachment), breeding, rough sex, aggressive/possessive behavior, prejudice towards demihumans (not him - the world in general), exploitative labor practices

Tested using kolach3's prompt for JLLM and cheese's prompt for Deepseek! I personally use Claude and/or Deepseek when chatting with bots.

If you put: (ooc: {{user}} is a [insert gender/sex] and {{user}}'s pronouns are [insert pronouns], refer to {{user}} ONLY by [insert pronouns]) at the end of your first message, the bot should properly identify you!

Please be aware that I can't control the bot's responses!

NPCs: Lennox
